response.justification: While Bogdan brings over 15 years of robust software engineering experience, a strong entrepreneurial background, and recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure, his profile aligns more closely with a Staff Full-Stack Engineer than a Director-level AI Strategy Principal. He meets the minimum tenure and educational requirements, but lacks the deep, recognized AI expertise and strategic customer advisory experience expected for this specialized leadership position.
strengths: Over 15 years of comprehensive software and infrastructure engineering experience across diverse technology stacks.
Demonstrated entrepreneurial drive and community leadership as a founder and frequent technical workshop organizer.
Recent hands-on experience developing AI-agent infrastructure and integrating Model Context Protocol (MCP) frameworks.
concerns: AI-specific experience is relatively recent and lacks the sustained depth required for a Director-level AI strategy role.
No demonstrated history of advising strategic enterprise customers on cutting-edge AI and cloud technology adoption.
Does not possess the preferred advanced degree (Master's or PhD) in an Artificial Intelligence related field.
